log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Aven — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Aven — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Aven — Bardic Musician.
→ Aven — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 33 necrotic damage. HP: 34/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Aven — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aven — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:9+12=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 fire damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 20/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Aven — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 0 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aven — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:13+12=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 4 fire damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Aven — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aven — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aven — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:8+12=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 fire damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: 7/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Aven — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 0 remaining).
→ Aven — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Aven — Bardic Musician.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:17+12=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 fire damage. Aven — Bardic Musician HP: -9/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 6 rounds ===
